title: aeschynanthus polillensis
intro: Aeschynanthus polillensis, also known as the polillo lip or lipstick vine, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family, native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Aeschynanthus polillensis is typically prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions or decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
